name: bc754a27-88f9-451d-9961-5515047dc818

agentUtterance.text:
Welcome back. It's been a little while, but I'm glad you're here. Let's get re-oriented. I can help you bring things back into one place by:

Reviewing your daily agenda and financial balances.

Managing to-do lists and scheduling calendar events.

Saving "Growth Notes" to track your progress.

Answering questions on personal growth and executive functioning.

Would you like to start your daily check-in now, or is there something else on your mind?

userUtterance.text: Yes, I need to check my agenda

playbookInput.precedingConversationSummary: A returning user is asking about Able's capabilities.

playbookOutput.executionSummary: User wants to check the agenda with the agent.

description: Demonstrate the "welcome back" variant after a 30-day absence.
